_meta.method: Replicates the L1 pilot recipe (see .claude/scratch/districts-provenance.md) across 13 districts. Per-field fetch log in batch-1-provenance.md. Fields here: medianValue, enrollment, levy, schoolRate, libraryRate, board_url, town, jurisdiction. STAR fields are NOT restated: they already live in the existing districts.json stub rows and were not re-verified today; the merge into districts.json keeps those stub STAR values.
_meta.schema: mirrors the districts.json pilot full-row schema minus the STAR trio (kept from stubs) and county_leg (officials lane, out of scope for this batch).
_meta.gates: Every schoolRate/libraryRate parcel passed the in-district HARD GATE: the LRV /info/<PARID> page School District label was confirmed to name the target district before the rate was trusted (this caught a Valley Stream 30 seed that landed in Elmont UFSD, and an East Williston abbreviation E WILLISTON). Elementary districts (Franklin Square, New Hyde Park-Garden City Park, Valley Stream 30) use Census summary level 9500000US; their single Net School Tax line is the combined elementary + CHSD rate (not itemized on the county bill). libraryRate 0.0 = verified structural absence of a Net Library Tax line on the Class-1 bill (confirmed on 2 parcels), not a fetch miss.

gaps: levy: OSC lists a Nassau/Oyster Bay row ($19,648,866) but Census TIGER places Amityville UFSD entirely in Suffolk (bbox lon -73.43..-73.40); the district's true levy is on the Suffolk OSC dataset (out of scope). Omitted rather than record a conflicting Nassau-county figure.

schoolRate/libraryRate: no Nassau Class-1 parcel resolves to Amityville school district (probed the SW county-line area); LRV covers Nassau parcels only and this district's territory is in Suffolk. Omitted.
Amityville Union Free School District.note: Suffolk-home-county district; only the district-wide ACS median and NYSED enrollment are Nassau-verifiable. Levy and parcel tax rate are Nassau-out-of-scope gaps (see gaps).
Amityville Union Free School District.town: Town of Babylon (Suffolk home county); the OSC Nassau row is filed under Town of Oyster Bay
